questionHtml:
What is the function of the loop of Henle?

A. To reabsorb salt

B. To maintain a hypertonic solution in the medulla

C. To transport liquid from the collecting ducts to the convoluted tubules

D. To reabsorb glucose

meta.title: What is the function of the loop of Henle? A. To reabsorb salt B. To maintain a hypertonic solution in the medulla C. To transport liquid from the collecting ducts to the convolute
